creator: dym@afalina.od.ua
text:
Make ipsec-tools fail on FreeBSD 12.2 with openssl-1.1.1j_1,1 from ports and add on make.conf:

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=openssl

================================================
eaytest.c:106:41: error: incomplete definition of type 'struct evp_pkey_st'
        error = eay_check_rsasign(src, sig, evp->pkey.rsa);
                                            ~~~^
/usr/include/openssl/ossl_typ.h:93:16: note: forward declaration of 'struct evp_pkey_st'
typedef struct evp_pkey_st EVP_PKEY;
               ^
eaytest.c:316:6: warning: comparison of array 'dnstr_w1' not equal to a null pointer is always true [-Wtautological-pointer-compare]
        if (dnstr_w1 != NULL) {
            ^~~~~~~~    ~~~~
eaytest.c:326:6: warning: comparison of array 'dnstr_w1' not equal to a null pointer is always true [-Wtautological-pointer-compare]
        if (dnstr_w1 != NULL) {
            ^~~~~~~~    ~~~~
2 warnings and 1 error generated.
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[6]: stopped in /usr/ports/security/ipsec-tools/work/ipsec-tools-0.8.2/src/racoon
*** Error code 1
================================================

But deinstall openssl from ports, and add to make.conf:

DEFAULT_VERSIONS+= ssl=base

and ipsec-tools make without error.

FreeBSD clean install.

# uname -a
FreeBSD test 12.2-RELEASE-p3 FreeBSD 12.2-RELEASE-p3 r369327 GENERIC  amd64
